message:
style(tests): reformat assertion chains in security conformance integration test

Apply rustfmt-style formatting to two multi-line assertion chains in
evaluate_repeated_runs_are_deterministic_within_latency_tolerance:
- Break long assert_eq! for observations_by_workload into multi-line form
- Break chained .summary.malicious_latency_p95_us.abs_diff() assertion
  into multi-line form for readability

No logic changes — pure formatting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
